items.title: OpenAI hints at GPT-5 release window in upcoming earnings call
items.summary: OpenAI's CFO suggested in a conference appearance that the next-generation flagship is targeted for Q3 — earlier than analysts expected.
items.why_it_matters: Shorter release cycles mean the API patterns you write today may need adjusting more often. Worth watching for breaking changes in the Python SDK.

items.title: Tauri 2.1 ships with smaller binary footprint
items.summary: Tauri 2.1 reduces minimum binary size by 18% via tree-shaking improvements and a leaner default WebView shim.
items.why_it_matters: If you've been curious about shipping a desktop app from web tech, Tauri is the sane Rust-backed alternative to Electron — smaller binaries make the on-ramp friendlier.

items.title: Anthropic ships Claude Opus 4.7 with 1M context window
items.summary: Claude Opus 4.7 expands the context window to 1M tokens for the API and Claude apps. Early benchmark numbers show stronger long-context retrieval and a price drop on cached input.
items.why_it_matters: 1M context means dropping a full codebase or a long book in one shot is now practical. Relevant if you ever try to use it on your own multi-file Python projects.

takes.take: Notes the throughput numbers and a real-world long-context retrieval test.
Top comment is mostly skepticism on price-vs-capability vs. competitors.

items.title: DeepSeek R2 open-weights release lands on Hugging Face
items.summary: DeepSeek pushed the R2 model weights to Hugging Face under an MIT-style license. Includes both base and instruct variants.
items.why_it_matters: Open-weights models you can run locally are the closest thing to building a model on your own laptop without renting GPUs. Worth a look even if you don't have the hardware to run it.

items.title: GitHub Copilot adds Spaces — shareable contexts for repos
items.summary: GitHub launched Copilot Spaces — bundles of files, docs, and notes that an AI assistant can pin to as a long-running context.
items.why_it_matters: If you eventually want a persistent assistant that knows your project without re-explaining it every time, this is one shape of how that gets productized.
